title: 让发布前门禁按版本状态生效

sources.reason: The preparation-mode signal is currently limited to release branch names, but follow-up release fixes also need the same narrow version-state gate.
Regression coverage for the preparation-mode event signal.

riskAssessment.reason: The event signal must allow release-related PRs to validate the next patch without making arbitrary future versions acceptable.

executionDecision.reason: The narrow version-state check remains in the distribution checker; this change only corrects which CI events enable it.

preReviewWarnings: Review that preparation mode is enabled only for pull requests/main pushes and the checker still enforces the exact next patch.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Pull request and main push smoke runs enable preparation mode for the pending next patch release.
The distribution checker remains responsible for rejecting non-next versions and strict mode remains available for workflow_dispatch.
Workflow regression tests and project quality checks pass.
guidelines: Keep preparation mode narrow and let the checker enforce the exact next-patch rule.
Keep workflow_dispatch strict for post-publication verification.

intent.problem: The release workflow authentication fix PR still fails smoke because its branch is not named codex/release-v*, even though release.json is the exact next pending patch.
constraints: Only change smoke event signaling and its regression test.
Do not change release metadata or strict checker behavior.
intent.rationale: Preparation eligibility should be based on the release event state, while the checker remains the authority for exact version sequencing.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: pull request and main push smoke runs enable preparation mode
workflow regression and quality checks pass

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User accepted the release gate workflow adjustment; this change corrects the preparation event signal without weakening version validation.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
